title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I received a message from my mother.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
She says, "Never in my wildest dreams did I think
my own daughter would run in the Japanese
Derby."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"My only wish is for you to achieve results you can
be satisfied with."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: "Gib dein Bestes!" That means "Do your best."
choice_data_list: I hope we can live up to her expectations.
I hope we can live up to her expectations.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: It's nothing. All races are the same.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
All that's required of me is to do what must be
done as always, and achieve the proper results.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Nervous isn't the correct word. I'm not sure what
is though...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: But I will still do what needs to be done.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Now, I'll be off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(So this is the Derby... The audience's cheering is
so loud, the very ground is trembling.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: (...Why am I suddenly shaking?)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Is this nervousness? Anxiety? No, this feeling...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: (It's similar to how I felt when C.B. surpassed me.)

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
The trick to winning the Derby is telling yourself
that you'll win.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Channel your hunger to win into energy! Devour
the roar of the crowd, your opponents, your
limits, and your luck too!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: (I'm going... to win.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: (I'm going to win. I will win. I will absolutely win...)

text_block_list.name: Racer
text_block_list.text: I want to win!

text_block_list.name: Racer
text_block_list.text: I refuse to lose... I will be the Derby champion!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Good luck, everybody! Give it all you've got!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(I feel everyone's expectations, excitement,
worries, and fighting spirit so keenly, it's making
me tremble.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: (My body is trying to take it all in.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: (I see... This is neither nerves nor anxiety.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: (This is exaltation. I'm gearing myself up to win!)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This is it. I won't settle for anything less than
Sieg—victory.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Toi, toi, toi...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: The one who should become Derby champion... No, the one who will claim that title...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Is me!
